refactored_skills.name: detect_local_peaks
refactored_skills.description: Return indices of local peaks above a threshold.

refactored_skills.name: first_peak_after
refactored_skills.description: Find the first local peak after a given start index.
test_queries: First peak after index 0 in [0,1,4,1,3,1] threshold 3?
First peak after index 2 in [0,1,4,1,3,1] threshold 3?

refactored_skills.name: pair_nearby_peaks
refactored_skills.description: Pair peaks from two signals if their indices are within a max gap.
test_queries: Nearby peaks between [0,3,1,0,4,1] and [0,1,3,1,0,4] with threshold 3 gap 1?
Nearby peaks between [0,4,1,0] and [0,1,4,0] with threshold 4 gap 2?

refactored_skills.name: global_argmax_index
refactored_skills.description: Return the index of the global maximum sample.

refactored_skills.name: normalize_reference_title
refactored_skills.description: Normalize a reference title to a canonical token string.

refactored_skills.name: dedupe_reference_titles
refactored_skills.description: Deduplicate titles after canonical normalization, preserving first occurrence.

refactored_skills.name: titles_equivalent
refactored_skills.description: Check whether two titles are equivalent after canonical normalization.

refactored_skills.name: extract_year_tokens

tests.q: First peak after index 0 in [0,1,4,1,3,1] threshold 3?
First peak after index 2 in [0,1,4,1,3,1] threshold 3?
Nearby peaks between [0,3,1,0,4,1] and [0,1,3,1,0,4] with threshold 3 gap 1?
Nearby peaks between [0,4,1,0] and [0,1,4,0] with threshold 4 gap 2?
